summary: Testing Warehouse/Store Client Type Feature (Phase 4) for Audix Counter Software. All 12 backend tests PASSED. All frontend UI tests PASSED. Feature implementation is complete and working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: client_type field in Client model defaults to 'store' correctly
POST /api/portal/clients correctly stores and returns client_type field
GET /api/portal/clients returns client_type field for all clients
GET /api/portal/clients/{id}/stock returns records with custom_fields and extra_columns
DELETE /api/portal/clients/{id}/stock clears stock and updates client flags
Session auto-snapshot for warehouse clients: Creates session, copies client_stock to expected_stock, sets stock_snapshot=True
Session for store clients: No auto-snapshot, expected_stock_imported stays False
Frontend: Client type selector in Add Client dialog working
Frontend: Warehouse badge (orange) and Store badge (teal) display correctly
Frontend: Upload Stock and View Stock buttons only appear for warehouse clients
Frontend: Import Stock button hidden for warehouse sessions
Frontend: 'Stock: Snapshot' badge appears for warehouse sessions
Frontend: Download Template button in session import dialog fetches from schema endpoint
seed_data_creation: Used existing warehouse client WH001 (id: 77ec8bde-8064-48da-a881-39e491883039) with 3 stock records. Created and cleaned up TEST_ sessions during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 4 (Warehouse/Store Client Type) testing complete. All backend APIs and frontend UI working correctly. Existing data: WH001 (warehouse) has stock_imported=true with 3 records. RR001 and DM002 are store clients. Auto-snapshot verified for warehouse sessions.

features_verified.backend_create_warehouse_client: PASS - POST /api/portal/clients with client_type='warehouse' returns correct type
features_verified.backend_get_client_stock: PASS - GET /api/portal/clients/{id}/stock returns records with extra_columns
features_verified.backend_session_auto_snapshot_warehouse: PASS - Session creation for warehouse auto-imports stock, sets stock_snapshot=True
features_verified.backend_session_no_snapshot_store: PASS - Session creation for store does NOT auto-snapshot
features_verified.frontend_client_type_selector: PASS - Add Client dialog has Store/Warehouse dropdown
features_verified.frontend_warehouse_badge: PASS - Warehouse client shows orange 'Warehouse' badge
features_verified.frontend_store_badge: PASS - Store client shows teal 'Store' badge
features_verified.frontend_warehouse_stock_buttons: PASS - Warehouse client shows Upload Stock and View Stock buttons
features_verified.frontend_store_no_stock_buttons: PASS - Store client does NOT show Upload Stock button
features_verified.frontend_session_import_hidden_warehouse: PASS - Import Stock button hidden for warehouse sessions
features_verified.frontend_session_snapshot_badge: PASS - 'Stock: Snapshot' badge appears for warehouse sessions
features_verified.frontend_download_template_session: PASS - Download Template button in session import dialog
